response.justification: Wei Chen has over 6 years of full-stack experience, with strong proficiency in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and additional languages like Kotlin/Java. His work on AI-agent infrastructure and enterprise-level systems demonstrates deep technical expertise and problem-solving skills. However, his experience with Nest.js and Vitest is not explicitly mentioned, which slightly reduces his fit for the primary stack.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack requirements.
Proven track record in building scalable systems and contributing to architecture decisions, including AI-agent infrastructure.
Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail, with experience in optimizing performance and integrating APIs.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, which are core to the role, though he has strong Node.js and testing experience.
Some roles (e.g., GISCollective) use non-primary technologies like Dlang and Ember.js, which may indicate less recent focus on React.
No clear evidence of direct experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes in the resume, though Docker is mentioned.
